resultList.dtldesc: Luxurious 3 BHK Flat for Sale in Ace Aspire, Noida ExtensionLive luxuriously in this beautifully designed 3 BHK flat for sale in Ace Aspire, Noida Extension. Located in a prime and vibrant neighbourhood, this modern residence combines contemporary architecture, premium amenities, and seamless connectivity, making it an excellent choice for families looking to elevate their lifestyle.Property SpecificationsThis semi-furnished home spans a super built-up area of 1,595 sq. ft. and is thoughtfully designed for both comfort and convenience. It comprises three well-proportioned bedrooms and two Western-style bathrooms, including one attached and one common, each fitted with geysers for added ease.The apartment features three balconies that provide ample ventilation, scenic views, and abundant natural light. A spacious dining-cum-living area ensures a smooth flow of space, while the modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney and piped gas connection, accompanied by a dedicated utility space for additional convenience. Elegant vitrified flooring enhances the interiors, adding a touch of sophistication throughout.FacilitiesResidents enjoy one covered car parking slot, 24-hour water supply through both borewell and corporation connections, and complete power backup. Safety is prioritised with CCTV surveillance, a single-point security guard, and two lifts ensuring easy access across floors.The society offers a wide range of lifestyle amenities, including a clubhouse, gymnasium, swimming pool, jogging and cycling track, meditation area, childrens pool with water slides, and indoor games. A temple within the society and landscaped greenery provide a serene environment for peaceful living. Additional premium facilities such as a guest house, concierge service, coffee lounge, restaurant, library, barbeque pit, and dance studio create a truly elevated living experience.LocalitySituated close to Amrapali Leisure Park and Golden I Mall, the apartment benefits from excellent connectivity and accessibility. Schools, hospitals, and banksATMs are located within 1 km, ensuring day-to-day convenience. Public transport options are readily available, and a forthcoming metro station just 2 km away will further enhance connectivity to the rest of the city.
